##LOCALITY=Mammoth mine, Tiger, Pinal County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=UA Mineral Museum
##SOURCE=UA Mineral Museum
##DESCRIPTION=Black octahedral or cubo-octahedral crystals, associated with green prismatic dioptase
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R180001
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Cu_11.98_Pb_2.01_O_15_(Cl_1.92_Br_0.06_) ; = Light portion. Cu_12.12_Pb_1.92_O_15_(Cl_1.97_Br_0.12_) = Dark portion
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.2352 b: 9.2352 c: 9.2352 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 787.7 crystal system: cubic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
